summary: The scroll on the edit screen moves and the screen goes up
description: The scroll bar in the editing screen moves, causing the screen to scroll up. When editing a large section of content or adding reference links, the scroll bar moves, making it difficult to check the table of contents I was editing. When working on a large section of content, the table of contents often scrolls to the top instead of the center, or is not visible.
product_area: AEM Guides Web Editor / New Editor
symptoms: Unexpected scroll / view jumps while editing
TOC/outline loses position or jumps to top
TOC not visible or not centered on current section
notes_from_workflow: Demo recording requested for clarity; internal verification on New Editor with large table did not reproduce scroll issue; ticket closed fixed; fix version 2605.
